objective: Validate IMG_2628.MOV to the project definition of done: human truth artifacts, reviewed timestamp ledger, real visible 1.0x app/dashboard run, clean app-vs-truth comparison to 25 events, measured pacing, and updated documentation without using Moondream as validation truth.

success_criteria.requirement: Read and follow the real-app test case definition of done.
success_criteria.coverage: Directly inspected. It requires human final total, reviewed timestamp truth ledger, visible dashboard evidence, live backend event capture, clean app-vs-truth, pacing near 1.0, and regression checks.

success_criteria.requirement: Human final total for IMG_2628 is recorded as 25.
Reviewed timestamp truth ledger exists for all 25 countable placements.
success_criteria.coverage: Review aids and a Codex visual draft exist. The draft ledger is explicitly validation_truth_eligible=false, training_eligible=false, and promotion_eligible=false. A reviewed human/reconciled timestamp ledger still does not exist.

success_criteria.requirement: Moondream 2, if used, remains advisory/offline only and not validation truth or training data.
success_criteria.coverage: Moondream artifacts are bronze/pending advisory labels only with validation_truth_eligible=false and training_eligible=false.

success_criteria.requirement: Real app path is used: live_reader_snapshot, event_based, playback speed 1.0, no replay/timestamp/fake UI/hardcoded events.
success_criteria.coverage: Visible run summary records real_app_path=true, dashboard_started_by_click=true, demo_count_mode=live_reader_snapshot, counting_mode=event_based, demo_playback_speed=1.0, and no deterministic replay/timestamp reveal/hardcoded video events.

success_criteria.requirement: Visible dashboard proof starts Runtime Total at 0, shows IMG_2628.MOV, increments from real ordered processed frames, and ends at 25.
success_criteria.coverage: Chrome dashboard showed IMG_2628.MOV, Runtime Total 0 after clicking Start monitoring, then Demo complete / Runtime Total 25. Backend capture ended current_state=DEMO_COMPLETE with observed_event_count=25 and coverage 1668.01s.

success_criteria.requirement: Human total comparison for the visible run is clean.
App-vs-reviewed-truth comparison is clean: matched_count=25, missing_truth_count=0, unexpected_observed_count=0, first_divergence=null.
success_criteria.coverage: No reviewed truth ledger exists, so the required comparison cannot exist. The available draft-ledger comparison is not clean: matched_count=22, missing_truth_count=3, unexpected_observed_count=3, first_divergence=unexpected_observed@110.003s.

success_criteria.requirement: Wall/source pacing is measured and near 1.0 for the visible run.
success_criteria.coverage: Measured wall_per_source=1.0000006461578348 using captured event reader_frame_time and event_ts deltas.

success_criteria.requirement: Documentation and artifacts are updated under data/reports with img2628 naming.
success_criteria.coverage: Todo, handoff, lessons, summary/status/audit artifacts record the total-clean visible run and the remaining event-level blocker.

success_criteria.requirement: Registry/manifests are updated only if candidate satisfies the real app proof boundary.
success_criteria.coverage: No IMG_2628 registry promotion was made because event-level proof is not clean.

evidence: .venv/bin/python -m py_compile app/core/settings.py app/services/counting.py app/workers/vision_worker.py scripts/start_factory2_demo_app.py scripts/start_factory2_demo_stack.py scripts/validate_video.py scripts/build_img2628_motion_score_event_dataset.py scripts/build_img2628_placement_action_dataset.py scripts/build_img2628_placement_action_multiclass_dataset.py
success_criteria.coverage: py_compile passed; pytest result was 10 passed with warnings only.

blocking_gap.summary: The app visibly counts to the human total, but the project promotion definition still requires a reviewed timestamp ledger and clean app-vs-truth comparison. The available draft-ledger comparison shows 3 event swaps.

threshold_search_evidence.conclusion: Lowering min frames and increasing debounce suppresses the 110s event but undercounts badly and admits a different early false event.
Raising min frames includes the 883s short event but still keeps the 110s/1549s false-positive pattern and misses draft truth.

next_required_work: Adjudicate the six event-level disputes in data/reports/img2628_event_level_dispute_review.visible_dashboard_candidate25_v1.csv or data/reports/img2628_event_level_dispute_review.visible_dashboard_candidate25_v1.html.
Fill data/reports/img2628_event_level_dispute_decisions.template_v1.csv with decision, reviewer, and review_notes for every dispute row.
Run scripts/apply_img2628_event_dispute_decisions.py to build data/reports/img2628_human_truth_event_times.reviewed_v1.csv; the script intentionally fails closed while decisions are blank.
Build data/reports/img2628_human_truth_event_times.reviewed_v1.csv and data/reports/img2628_human_truth_ledger.reviewed_v1.json from the reviewed decisions.
Re-run app-vs-reviewed-truth comparison against the visible observed events or rerun the visible 1.0x path if the reviewed truth changes the required runtime behavior.
Only promote IMG_2628 if matched_count=25, missing_truth_count=0, unexpected_observed_count=0, and first_divergence=null against reviewed truth.
